---
title: "Machine Learning Concepts"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    fontsize: 13pt
    mainfont: Arial
---

<style> body {text-align: justify} </style>

Hi there, I'm Seunghoon, a Data Scientist with 7 years of professional experience. I have a Bachelor's degree and a Master's degree in Statistics. I have a strong background in machine learning, data analysis, and statistical modeling. My expertise lies in developing predictive models, implementing machine learning algorithms, and extracting insights from complex datasets.

All of the concepts were written in the way I understood in my own language and edited so that anyone can understand them easily. The goal of this website is to serve as a platform to share my knowledge and insights on various machine learning concepts, techniques, and best practices.
